=== 01_missing_colon.relon ===
source: "{ a 1, b: 2 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 2
  - expected `:` in dict field @ 3
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 3
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `:` in dict field)

=== 02_unclosed_brace.relon ===
source: "{ a: 1, b: 2\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 2
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 12
  - expected R_BRACE, found None @ 13
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `}` in dict)

=== 03_unclosed_bracket.relon ===
source: "[1, 2, 3\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 2
  - expected `,` or `]` in list @ 8
  - expected R_BRACK, found None @ 9
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `]` in list)

=== 04_unclosed_paren.relon ===
source: "{ x: f(1, 2 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 4
  - expected `,` or `)` in argument list @ 11
  - expected R_PAREN, found None @ 13
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 13
  - expected R_BRACE, found None @ 14
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `)` in argument list)

=== 05_unterminated_string.relon ===
source: "{ a: \"hello }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 2
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 14
  - expected R_BRACE, found None @ 14
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `}` in dict)

=== 06_unterminated_fstring.relon ===
source: "{ a: f\"hello ${name }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 2
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 22
  - expected R_BRACE, found None @ 22
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `}` in dict)

=== 07_dangling_dot.relon ===
source: "{ a: foo. }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 3
  - expected identifier or index after `.` @ 9
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 11
  - expected R_BRACE, found None @ 12
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected identifier or index after `.`)

=== 08_bad_number.relon ===
source: "{ a: 0xZZ, b: 2 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 7
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `}` in dict)

=== 09_stray_operator.relon ===
source: "{ a: + 1 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 0
parse_document: Err(parse error: could not lower well-formed CST to legacy Node)

=== 10_double_comma.relon ===
source: "{ a: 1, , b: 2 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 0
parse_document: Err(parse error: could not lower well-formed CST to legacy Node)

=== 11_stray_hash.relon ===
source: "{ a: # b: 2 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - expected expression @ 8
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected expression)

=== 12_for_no_var.relon ===
source: "{ xs: [x for in src] }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - expected `in` in comprehension @ 15
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `in` in comprehension)

=== 13_bad_escape.relon ===
source: "{ msg: \"hello\\q world\" }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 0
parse_document: Err(parse error: could not lower well-formed CST to legacy Node)

=== 14_fstring_unclosed_interp.relon ===
source: "{ msg: f\"${ } }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 2
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 16
  - expected R_BRACE, found None @ 16
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `}` in dict)

=== 15_bare_hash.relon ===
source: "#\n{ a: 1 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 3
  - expected attribute name @ 1
  - expected expression @ 5
  - trailing input after root value @ 8
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected attribute name)

=== 16_half_schema.relon ===
source: "#schema X {\n{ x: 1 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - expected dict key @ 12
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected dict key)

=== 17_dict_key_no_value.relon ===
source: "{ a:, b: 2 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - expected expression @ 4
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected expression)

=== 18_half_arrow.relon ===
source: "{ f: (x) -> }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 8
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `}` in dict)

=== 19_garbage_byte.relon ===
source: "{ a: 1 ~ b: 2 }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - expected `,` or `}` in dict @ 6
parse_document: Err(parse error: expected `,` or `}` in dict)

=== 20_empty.relon ===
source: "\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 0
parse_document: Err(parse error: empty document)

=== 21_plus_plus_concat.relon ===
source: "{ msg: \"a\" ++ \"b\" }\n"
round_trip: true
cst_errors: 1
  - `++` is not an operator — use `+` to concatenate strings @ 10
parse_document: Err(parse error: `++` is not an operator — use `+` to concatenate strings)
